mapper.select: SELECT dt.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, cd.dormitory_number AS current_dormitory_number, cd.building AS current_building, td.dormitory_number AS target_dormitory_number, td.building AS target_building FROM dormitory_transfer dt LEFT JOIN student s ON dt.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory cd ON dt.current_dormitory_id = cd.id LEFT JOIN dormitory td ON dt.target_dormitory_id = td.id WHERE dt.id = #{id}

SELECT dt.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, cd.dormitory_number AS current_dormitory_number, cd.building AS current_building, td.dormitory_number AS target_dormitory_number, td.building AS target_building FROM dormitory_transfer dt LEFT JOIN student s ON dt.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory cd ON dt.current_dormitory_id = cd.id LEFT JOIN dormitory td ON dt.target_dormitory_id = td.id WHERE dt.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY dt.apply_time DESC

SELECT dt.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, cd.dormitory_number AS current_dormitory_number, cd.building AS current_building, td.dormitory_number AS target_dormitory_number, td.building AS target_building FROM dormitory_transfer dt LEFT JOIN student s ON dt.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory cd ON dt.current_dormitory_id = cd.id LEFT JOIN dormitory td ON dt.target_dormitory_id = td.id ORDER BY dt.apply_time DESC

SELECT dt.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, cd.dormitory_number AS current_dormitory_number, cd.building AS current_building, td.dormitory_number AS target_dormitory_number, td.building AS target_building FROM dormitory_transfer dt LEFT JOIN student s ON dt.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory cd ON dt.current_dormitory_id = cd.id LEFT JOIN dormitory td ON dt.target_dormitory_id = td.id WHERE dt.status = #{status} ORDER BY dt.apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dormitory_transfer (student_id, current_dormitory_id, target_dormitory_id, reason, attachment) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{currentDormitoryId}, #{targetDormitoryId}, #{reason}, #{attachment})
